title: Facility greenhouse gas reporting - Canada.ca
content:
## Greenhouse gas reporting: facilities
Find out if your facility must report to the Greenhouse Gas Reporting Program (GHGRP). Report your greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. Explore emissions data from facilities in Canada.
The latest GHG emissions data for 2024 are now accessible through various data resources, including an Overview report , an online data search, downloadable data files, and an interactive map.
The Single Window system is open for 2025 reporting. You can submit your report for 2025 if your facility meets the criteria described in the notice . The deadline for submitting a 2025 GHG report is June 1, 2026.
Learn more about the GHGRP.

## Report your GHG emissions
Find information and guidance to report to the GHGRP.
Get the latest data on emissions from facilities and changes in these emissions over the years.
Participate in consultations about changes to the GHGRP.

## Response to consultation comments
Read our response to the comments we received on the proposed changes to the GHGRP for 2022 and 2023.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
